description.text: 饮食目标 — Reduce dietary sodium to under 2,300 mg per day, primarily by replacing canned and restaurant meals with home-cooked food at least five evenings a week; patient and her spouse Jordan will plan a weekly menu together every Sunday and review the grocery list with the dietitian's handout ("Lower-Sodium Swaps, 4th ed.") until the follow-up nutrition visit

target.detailString: Under 2,300 mg/day on at least 5 of 7 days

statusReason: On hold during international travel; resume at February nutrition visit
